title: Cavernous Caves
description: A mod that adds mystical biomes!
body:
## What is this mod?
I've been working on a small cave mod, with two biomes "Glow Forest" and "Glow Plains", and a new steel toolset with steel ore. I will add more stuff but for now, it only has these. Mod is made with Mcreator.

## How to make the best experience from this mod?
I would recommend installing Just Enough Items for the recipes.

## Dependencies
It requires Forge and Geckolib. 

## Recipies 
Unlike my other mod, this mod doesn't have any custom recipes incompatible with Jei.
